item.name: Warlion Horn
item.description: This imposing horn emits a thunderous tone that summons your fearless warlion.

mount.name: Warlion
mount.action: Summon forth your fearless warlion to rule over the battlefield, such is his station as king of the beasts.
mount.description: Early in the Sixth Astral Era, lions were brought over from the Near East and trained to serve as battle mounts for the Sultansworn of Ul'dah. Deemed unbreakable, those not sold to the Coliseum for venationes were released into the deserts of Thanalan where they eventually reverted back to a feral state.
mount.tooltip:
I, too, see the friends
I lost in the lions and
spinners...
- Gregory
